summary:
The only one clearly outside typical signs of early reversible injury is “Bleb” because it appears later when tissue becomes more damaged – indicating an advancement beyond what would still allow recovery if conditions improve. Other options like ER swelling, mitochondrial swelling/dilation, and ribosomal detachment all represent initial metabolic disruptions seen before permanent structural change occurs.

Final Answer: Bleb
